meta.commit_message: 4183 improve the representation of neutral beam tangency in the toroidal cross section plotting \(#4199\) CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking Used correct interpretation of dx_beam_duct as full width\, using centreline tangency CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking Add consistent NBI duct construction and centreline plotting. Construct beam edges and centreline using tangent-to-circle geometry with shielded TF width\, ensuring symmetric duct about the centreline.
